creator: beastie@tardisi.com
text:
earlier reply didn't seem to make it back to PR.


-------- Original Message --------
Subject: Re: ports/176676: [patch] net/ss5: syslog option is noisy
Date: Thu, 28 Mar 2013 09:29:29 -0500
From: The BSD Dreamer <beastie@tardisi.com>
To: cs@FreeBSD.org
CC: raffaele.delorenzo@libero.it



On 03/27/2013 15:40, cs@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: [patch] net/ss5: syslog option is noisy
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: cs
> State-Changed-When: Wed Mar 27 20:39:12 UTC 2013
> State-Changed-Why: 
> I get the following leftover error on redports:
> 
> === Checking filesystem state after all packages deleted
> ================================================================
> list of extra files and directories in / (not present on clean system but present after everything was deinstalled)
>   9562        8 drwxr-xr-x    2 root             wheel                  40 Mar 27 20:32 usr/local/etc/ss5
>   9564        8 -rw-r--r--    1 root             wheel                 118 Mar 27 20:32 usr/local/etc/ss5/ss5.ha
> ================================================================
> build of /usr/ports/net/ss5 ended at Wed Mar 27 20:32:49 UTC 2013
> 
> would you mind checking and resending a new patch
> 
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=176676
> 

-- 
  Name: Lawrence "The Dreamer" Chen      Email: beastie@tardisi.com
 Snail: 1530 College Ave, A5              Blog: http://lawrencechen.net
        Manhattan, KS 66502-2768         Phone: 785-789-4132
